howItWorks.intro: This iran oil sanctions and your gas price calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Monthly impact = gallons used × price change
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: How much do Iran sanctions affect gas prices?
faq.answer: Maximum pressure sanctions remove about 1.5 million barrels per day from global markets, which translates to roughly $0.15-0.25/gallon at the pump. Lifting sanctions and allowing full Iranian exports would add similar supply and reduce prices by a comparable amount.

faq.question: Is the Iran Oil Sanctions and Your Gas Price Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard geopolitics and energy markets formulas trusted by analysts and informed citizens. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What policy direction should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate policy direction value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the Iran Oil Sanctions and Your Gas Price Calculator is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

sections.title: What Is the Iran Oil Sanctions and Your Gas Price Calculator?
sections.body: The Iran Oil Sanctions and Your Gas Price Calculator is a free online tool designed for analysts and informed citizens who need quick, accurate calculations in the geopolitics and energy markets space. By entering your policy direction, current gas price, monthly miles, you get instant results including oil supply change, oil price impact, new gas price. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting oil supply change right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In geopolitics and energy markets, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by analysts and informed citizens worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand global dynamics with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your policy direction and need to find the right oil supply change. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
